news.title: Gold ETFs break 13-month streak of positive inflow; records ₹725 cr outflow in May
news.description: Gold ETFs faced a ₹725 crore outflow in May, ending a 13-month inflow streak amidst changing investor sentiment.

news.title: AMFI data: Gold ETFs record first monthly net outflow in 13 months. Here's why
news.description: AMFI data shows Gold ETFs posted their first monthly outflow in 13 months in May. Profit booking and weaker fresh investments weighed on flows despite rising gold prices.

news.title: Phillip Morris India calls for stronger enforcement and collaboration to disrupt illicit tobacco ecosystem
news.description: As per the Tobacco Institute of India (TII), in India, illicit cigarettes represent nearly one-fourth of the domestic market, with estimated losses of Rs. 23,000 crores per annum.

news.title: Asics to Spin Off Its Red-hot Onitsuka Tiger Brand in Company Split
news.description: Asics Corporation said on Wednesday that it will spin off its successful Onitsuka Tiger brand next year through an absorption-type company split.

news.title: India remains a bright spot for consumption despite global uncertainty, says Tata Sons' Chandrasekaran
news.description: Tata Sons' chairman N Chandrasekaran said India's demographic strength and expanding infrastructure continue to underpin growth as Tata Consumer pushes deeper into new categories, channels and premium offerings.
